issues.display_title: Issue #1604: [Slicing] CreateGallery Step 1 (/create-exhibition) — markup & styles
issues.main_description_html:
Epic B — Gallery wizard · Step 1 CreateGallery

Slice Step 1 (choose a space) — also builds the shared wizard shell (logged-in nav, sticky action bar, step progress "Step 1 of 3").

Scope

  • Space grid as radio cards (badge Modifiable/Fixed + selected check); filter chips (All/Modifiable/Fixed) + result count.
  • Sticky action bar: hint, Skip, Continue (disabled until selection).
  • Light + dark; responsive. Markup only.

Acceptance criteria

  • Matches CreateGallery.html in both themes, all breakpoints.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Compare to CreateGallery.html on desktop & mobile.
  2. Select a card → selected state shows; Continue enables.
  3. Dark mode + responsive grid reflow correct.

Demo by Developer

Desain.tanpa.judul.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #1605: [Integration] CreateGallery Step 1 — real templates, filters, state
issues.main_description_html:
Epic B — Gallery wizard · Step 1 CreateGallery

Wire Step 1 to real data + state.

Scope

  • Bind space grid + filters to real template/catalogue data (no hard-coded 8 cards).
  • Selection saved to WizardStateService; Continue → Step 2; Back → profile/origin.

Acceptance criteria

  • Real templates render; filters + counts accurate; selection persists to state.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Load step 1 → real templates appear; counts match.
  2. Filter Modifiable/Fixed → grid + count update.
  3. Select + Continue → step 2; Back → selection retained.
  4. Empty/error data → graceful message.

Demo by Developer

issues.display_title: Issue #1607: [Integration] NameGallery Step 2 — counter, suggestions, state
issues.main_description_html:
Epic B — Gallery wizard · Step 2 NameGallery

Wire Step 2 logic + state.

Scope

  • Char counter (max 60, over-state), suggestion chips fill the field, personalized suggestion from user's name.
  • Persist name to WizardStateService; gated Continue → Step 3; Back preserves context.

Acceptance criteria

  • Counter accurate; chips work; name persists; order preserved.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Type 60+ chars → counter caps/over-state; input limited.
  2. Click a suggestion chip → fills field; Continue enables.
  3. Continue → step 3; Back → name retained.

issues.display_title: Issue #1609: [Integration] AddArtworks Step 3 — real upload, validation, previews
issues.main_description_html:
Epic B — Gallery wizard · Step 3 AddArtworks

Wire Step 3 upload to the real backend.

Scope

  • Real upload (JPG/PNG/GLB; enforce type + size limit), drag/drop + click, previews, remove/clear, GLB tile.
  • Files saved to WizardStateService / backend; Create gallery → success.

Acceptance criteria

  • Valid files upload + preview; invalid rejected; ≥1 required to finish (Skip allowed).

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Drop valid JPG/PNG → previews appear; count updates; Create enables.
  2. Drop a GLB → shows GLB/3D tile.
  3. Oversized or wrong-type file → rejected.
  4. Remove / Clear all → grid updates; Create disables at 0.
  5. Create gallery → proceeds to success.

issues.display_title: Issue #1599: [Integration] Login (/login) — real auth, Google, redirect
issues.main_description_html:
Epic A — Auth · Login (/login)

Wire Login to the real backend.

Scope

  • Real auth service (replace the prototype's simulated submit).
  • Real Google OAuth; "Forgot password?" → /forgot-password; "Sign up" → /signup.
  • Validation + error states; honor existing post-login redirect.

Acceptance criteria

  • Valid creds log in and redirect correctly; invalid creds show errors; Google login works.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Log in with valid credentials → authenticated + redirected as expected.
  2. Wrong password → inline error; no navigation.
  3. Empty fields → validation blocks submit.
  4. "Log in with Google" → real OAuth completes.
  5. "Forgot password?" → /forgot-password.

issues.display_title: Issue #1597: [Integration] WizardStateService + step guards
issues.main_description_html:
Epic 0 — Shared building blocks

In-memory wizard state service + step guards for the 3-step gallery-creation flow.

Scope

  • WizardStateService holds chosen space, gallery name, and uploaded files across steps.
  • Route guards prevent deep-linking step 2/3 without completing step 1 (redirect to step 1).
  • Reset rules when the flow completes or is abandoned.

Acceptance criteria

  • State persists across back/next within the flow; refresh restarts the wizard (acceptable); guards enforce order.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Complete step 1, go to step 2, press Back → step 1 still shows the chosen space.
  2. Try to open step 3 URL directly without step 1 → redirected to step 1.
  3. Refresh mid-wizard → flow restarts cleanly (no broken/partial state).
  4. Finish the flow → state resets (starting again is fresh).

issues.display_title: Issue #1627: [slicing] Build DashboardShellComponent (sidebar + nav)
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: Dashboard shell (foundation)

Create a reusable DashboardShellComponent (src/app/layouts/dashboard-shell/) — the single left-sidebar shell for all authenticated pages, designed to also serve the future Settings redesign. It replaces the legacy global app-sidemenu for these routes.

Scope:

  • Profile block (avatar via convertPathImage, name, medium as role).
  • Primary Start creating CTA → Start Creating route.
  • Vertical nav: My Galleries / Information / Help / Settings with routerLinkActive + aria-current="page".
  • Upgrade your plan button gated on allowedPricing && isExperimental && !whiteLabel (mirror sidemenu.component).
  • White-label variants preserved.
  • <ng-content> for the page main column.

Acceptance: identical across all 4 pages; nav routes + active state correct; upgrade visibility matches existing rules; keyboard-focusable; dark mode correct. Includes *.spec.ts.

Depends on: _Port shared dashboard styles into dashboard.scss.

Part of the My Galleries authenticated-surface redesign.
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/my galleries/plan.md · brainstorming.md

Demo by Developer

2026-06-09.17-22-21.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #1596: [Integration] SSR-safe TOC scroll-spy directive
issues.main_description_html:
Epic 0 — Shared building blocks

SSR-safe Table-of-Contents scroll-spy directive for the legal pages (Terms, Privacy).

Scope

  • IntersectionObserver-based active-section highlighting in the sticky TOC.
  • SSR no-op (guard with isPlatformBrowser); links still work without JS.

Acceptance criteria

  • Active TOC item updates as the user scrolls; anchor links jump correctly; no SSR errors.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Scroll Terms/Privacy → the TOC highlights the section in view.
  2. Click a TOC item → page scrolls to that section.
  3. Disable JS → TOC links still navigate via anchors.
  4. View-source (SSR) → content present, no console errors on hydrate.

  • Continue disabled until a space is chosen.
  • Verify whether a name step already exists in the current create flow; add a lightweight name field/dialog only if missing.
  • Preserve auth-gating, plan-limit (403) dialog, and popup-blocked fallback (as in catalogue).

Acceptance: creates an exhibition and lands in /editor/:id; all guard paths preserved. Includes spec.

Depends on: Build Start Creating page.

Part of the My Galleries authenticated-surface redesign.
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/my galleries/plan.md · brainstorming.md

issues.display_title: Issue #1611: [Integration] GalleryCreated — slug/URL, share, editor handoff
issues.main_description_html:
Epic B — Gallery wizard · GalleryCreated

Wire the success page.

Scope

  • Real created-gallery slug/URL in the share field; copy-to-clipboard; X/Facebook/LinkedIn/email share links.
  • "Continue editing" → /editor/:id of the new gallery; close → My Galleries; bind preview to the created exhibition.

Acceptance criteria

  • Share link is the real gallery URL; copy works; editor handoff opens the right gallery.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Finish wizard → success shows the real gallery link.
  2. Copy link → clipboard has the URL; label shows "Copied!".
  3. Click each social → correct prefilled share.
  4. "Continue editing" → opens /editor/:id for the new gallery.

issues.display_title: Issue #1664: [Integration] Add Support Dropdown To Header
issues.main_description_html:
Type: Integration (wiring) · Epic: Foundation

Add the "Support" dropdown (.nav-menu → Clients / Promo codes) to the redesigned HeaderComponent.

Scope: dropdown with Esc/outside-click close + aria-expanded/aria-haspopup; gated on user_type === 'support' (mirrors AuthSupportGuard). Support pages render in the standard shell (no dashboard sidebar).

Acceptance: dropdown shows only for support users; routes to /support + /promocodes; active state correct; keyboard-accessible.

Part of the Support Console redesign (Clients + Promo Codes CRUD).
Refs: docs/15-06-2026/plan.md · docs/15-06-2026/brainstorm.md. Related: #1658–#1662 (Project 32).

issues.display_title: Issue #1663: [Slicing] Add Support Admin Styles To _admin.scss
issues.main_description_html:
Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Foundation

Port the New-Villume-2 admin/table/form/modal styles into a new shared partial src/assets/scss/common/_admin.scss, imported from styles.scss.

Classes: .admin, .admin-head/.admin-title/.admin-tools/.admin-search/.admin-subbar, .table-wrap/.table-scroll/.client-table, th.sortable+aria-sort, .pagination/.pag-*, .empty-state, .client-cell/.client-avatar/.client-id/.cell-mono, .code-chip/.code-copy, .status/.dot, .discount, .usage/.usage-track/.usage-fill, .exp-never/.exp-date, .seg, .row-actions/.icon-btn.danger, .modal/.modal-scrim/.modal-dialog/.confirm-dialog, .form-head/.form-card/.form-section/.code-row/.input-affix/.dur-stack/.form-actions, .form-summary/.fs-*.

Acceptance: uses _design-tokens.scss (no hard-coded colors); light + dark; no vi vi-* / col16-*.

Part of the Support Console redesign (Clients + Promo Codes CRUD).
Refs: docs/15-06-2026/plan.md · docs/15-06-2026/brainstorm.md. Related: #1658–#1662 (Project 32).

issues.main_description_html:
Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Clients (/support) · ref #1658

Rebuild support.component markup on the .admin table (design: Support.html).

Scope: .admin-head (<h1>Clients</h1> + total) + .admin-search + field <select>; .client-table (avatar-initials + name/email, Member since, Last login date+time, Log in action); .empty-state; .pagination.

Acceptance: renders on the new table; dark mode + responsive (horizontal scroll); no legacy markup.

issues.display_title: Issue #1666: [Integration] Wire Clients Search, Field Filter, Pagination + Assisted-Login Confirm
issues.main_description_html:
Type: Integration (wiring) · Epic: Clients (/support) · ref #1658

Wire the redesigned Clients page to the existing server-side data layer.

Scope: keep getUsers (page/limit, query-param sync) + field filter options All / First name / Last name / Email; changePage. Add a confirmation dialog before loginAsUser (assisted login) — use neutral copy (NOT "this action is logged" unless audit logging is confirmed — see brainstorm Decision 2).

Acceptance: server search/filter/pagination intact; impersonation gated behind confirm; AuthSupportGuard unchanged.

Part of the Support Console redesign (Clients + Promo Codes CRUD).
